description: Custom Scope Proposal Generator index. Each entry is one self-contained static HTML proposal generated off the shared format template, hosted at /proposals/custom/<slug>.html. Used for limited-scope, non-standard, repair-only, and partial-job proposals. To generate a new one: copy an existing slug HTML, swap content + cover, append a row here.

proposals.scope_summary: Custom partial reroof: front main hip (32x18, 8/12) + 2 dormers
